goal: Optimize only the output_layer parameters to reduce MSE below the baseline, then export the updated model to /app/model.pt in TorchScript format.
summary: Phase 2 produced /app/model.pt (5,090,024 bytes, valid TorchScript archive) and /app/verify.py (clean syntax, ends with 'ALL CHECKS PASSED' and exit 0). Closed-form lstsq over the frozen decoder output drove new_mse from 1.5517 down to 0.0163 (98.95% improvement). State dicts differ ONLY on output_layer.{weight, bias}; strict=True load_state_dict of /app/weights.pt into a fresh copy of /app/model.pt succeeds; /app/weights.pt sha256 unchanged at 71471e71c5a311a897362dd5b77413e7ca2ca59abd00a110bdc2cd3f8584d080.
stepSummaries:
1. Run an optimization loop (Adam with several thousand iterations, or LBFGS with strong-wolfe) on output_layer.parameters() until MSE < baseline, then export the model with torch.jit.save to /app/model.pt. [verified]
  2. Verify success criteria: load /app/model.pt, load /app/weights.pt into it, confirm only output_layer keys differ, confirm new MSE < baseline, confirm /app/weights.pt checksum unchanged. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 was a smoke test (tune_and_save.py ran end-to-end and produced /app/model.pt), step 2 was a real test (verify.py asserts every criterion with concrete numeric comparisons and exits non-zero on any failure). Load-bearing behavior is exercised: forward passes on real data, MSE comparisons, sha256 check.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 2 verify output: 'ALL CHECKS PASSED' with enumerated concrete numbers (baseline_mse, new_mse, key counts, sha256).

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal: optimize output_layer to reduce MSE below baseline and save as TorchScript. Goal met — /app/model.pt exists, loads cleanly, new_mse < baseline_mse by 98.95%, only output_layer parameters changed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: /app/model.pt exists (5MB), torch.jit.load works, output_layer.{weight,bias} differ from /app/weights.pt, new_mse=0.0163 < baseline_mse=1.5517.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. All planned work for Phase 2 is complete: tuning ran (lstsq succeeded on first try), saving succeeded (torch.jit.script + torch.jit.save), verification passed every criterion.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Both steps in phase 2 are completed; verify.py exits 0; all four success criteria pass.
